headline: International Paper Analysts Slash Their Forecasts Following Q1 Results
summary: International Paper (NYSE:IP) reports mixed results for Q1 with earnings of 15 cents per share beating estimates, while sales of $5.970 billion fell short.

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on International Paper, Lowers Price Target to $43
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Detlef Winckelmann   maintains International Paper (NYSE:IP) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $46 to $43.

headline: International Paper posts 13.4% rise in Q1 2026 net sales
summary: Earnings from continuing operations was $76m, against a loss of $124m in the first quarter of 2025.
